title: Alternative Twilight(Remastered)
description: Added more mechanisms to the bosses of Twilight Forest, making it more time to prepare for them
body:
This module adds more mechanisms to the boss of Twilight Forest, allowing players to make more preparations to guide them.

More animation variations and a richer interactive experience have been added to Naga.

This is a remake of Alternative Twilight, the original mod link:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alternative-twilight

Compared to the original version's mechanical modifications to the boss, this reset is designed to provide a more designed mechanical modification. And introduce more details and objects to try to further enrich the world of the Twilight Forest.
